microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **creator-facing validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise partners including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining self-service scheduling requirements and activation-funnel instrumentation that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability — delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate** — surfacing critical defects and establishing a new continuous-validation feedback loop across engineering teams.
Built an **AI planning agent** and restructured end-to-end drill workflows, cutting planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% without adding headcount.
Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**.
microsoft_2023: Drove **creator adoption** of AI-driven code-generation workflows through user demos and training sessions, lifting utilization across 14 key teams and saving **37 engineering hours monthly**.

Shaped the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by conducting **11+ user interviews** with Azure service teams, surfacing activation gaps and translating creator feedback into prioritized feature specs.

Accelerated creator onboarding to AI tooling by migrating documentation to a semantic search platform with rigorous metadata standards, **cutting lookup time by 83%** and reducing first-mile friction.
microsoft_2022: Secured cross-functional alignment across 140+ teams on a unified automation prioritization framework, **launching regions 28% faster** and generating $3M in accelerated revenue.

Defined a product strategy to eliminate manual toil in region launches — conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to identify **81 hours of manual effort per region** — and built a roadmap to automate critical activation paths.
Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to surface high-impact automation gaps and make data-driven roadmap decisions.
amazon_robotics: Defined the legacy OS migration strategy and mapped dependencies across 1,200+ stations, achieving **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition.
Facilitated Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer onboarding and intake process.
Aligned IT, Operations, and Engineering on automated CI/CD pipelines, **accelerating deployment cycles by 25%** and improving reliability of iterative software releases.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly proposals through a redesigned CRM process that improved conversion at every funnel stage.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy — optimizing the website, Google profile, and creator-facing content to drive audience growth.

Identified and closed margin leaks by conducting **profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, surfacing pricing model gaps and delivering actionable insights that improved leadership decision-making.
